occupation_title: Inspectors, Testers, Sorters, Samplers, and Weighers
occupation_definition: Inspect, test, sort, sample, or weigh nonagricultural raw materials or processed, machined, fabricated, or assembled parts or products for defects, wear, and deviations from specifications. May use precision measuring instruments and complex test equipment.
